ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type" INTEGER /* ID of the program type */,
  "city" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the program is located */,
  "country" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the program is located */,
  "region" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the program is located */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the program */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_type FOREIGN KEY ("program_type") REFERENCES program_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "institution_address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "institution_website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "institution_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the institution */,
  "institution_established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  "institution_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the institution */,
  "institution_contact_person_title" TEXT /* Title of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the program type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program type */,
  "type_duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the program type */,
  "type_eligibility" TEXT /* General eligibility criteria for the program type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the city is located */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "city_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the country is located */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "country_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., cadet, administrator) */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or rank of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saved_programs" (
  "save_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saved program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program saved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saved the program */,
  "save_date" TEXT /* Date the program was saved */,
  "save_notes" TEXT /* Any notes the user wants to save with the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("save_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saved_programs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saved_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_programs" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the program */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the program was shared */,
  "share_email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "share_notes" TEXT /* Any notes the user wants to share with the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_programs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program applied for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cadet who applied */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, reviewed, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_reason" TEXT /* Reason for applying to the program */,
  "application_cv" TEXT /* CV or resume of the applicant */,
  "application_reference" TEXT /* Any reference letters or documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acceptances" (
  "acceptance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acceptance */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application accepted */,
  "acceptance_date" TEXT /* Date the acceptance was issued */,
  "acceptance_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accepting the application */,
  "acceptance_conditions" TEXT /* Any conditions or requirements for acceptance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acceptance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acceptances_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cadet participating */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program participated in */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Current status of the participant (e.g., enrolled, completed, withdrawn) */,
  "participant_certificate" TEXT /* Any certificates or awards received during the program */,
  "participant_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who submitted the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_recommendation" TEXT /* Whether the participant recommends the program to others */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_reviews_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program rated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the program (1-5) */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_ratings_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "acceptances" INTEGER /* Number of acceptances issued */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants */,
  "program_views" INTEGER /* Number of times the program has been viewed */,
  "program_shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the program has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_statistics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
